Background.occupation: Mid-level Project Manager at a corporate logistics firm
Background.key_experience: Spending his entire childhood as the 'peacekeeper' between two highly competitive siblings, which taught him that staying neutral and following the group consensus was the safest path to approval.

Current_State.recent_memory: Stood in line for 20 minutes at a trendy new salad chain because he saw it mentioned in a 'Day in the Life' vlog, only to realize he actually prefers the sandwich shop next door.
